title: Better Auto Totem
description: Auto Totem automatically places and activates a totem of undying to save the player from fatal damage.
body:
**Better Auto Totem** is a lightweight and simple mod that automatically places a Totem of Undying into your off-hand whenever you don’t have one equipped.
Stay protected at all times without having to open your inventory or manage totems manually.

Just keep a totem somewhere in your inventory, and the mod will handle the rest making your gameplay safer and smoother in dangerous situations.

![auto totem](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/65ef258790695acc917cd1929dff837294e0d725.png)

The mod also includes a simple toggle system. you can turn Auto Totem ON or OFF at any time with a customizable keybind.
Just open the controls menu, choose your preferred key, and switch the feature on or off whenever you want.

A clean, convenient, and reliable way to keep yourself safe while exploring, fighting, or surviving in Minecraft.
